200.description: Full property details including description, amenities, pricing, and location

schema.description: Response wrapper for the property detail endpoint

data.description: Full property detail containing everything needed to render a complete property page

address.description: Full street address of the property

description.description: Full editorial description of the property
description.example: Meadow Cottage is a beautifully restored thatched cottage nestled in the heart of Porlock. With three bedrooms, a cosy wood burner, and a private garden, it offers the perfect retreat for families exploring Exmoor National Park.

things_to_do.description: Things to do near the property
things_to_do.example: Walk the South West Coast Path from Porlock Weir to Lynmouth, visit Dunster Castle, or explore the Exmoor Dark Skies reserve.

food_and_drinks.example: The Whortleberry Tea Room in Porlock is a 5-minute walk. The Ship Inn at Porlock Weir serves excellent local seafood.

walk_and_beaches.example: Porlock Weir beach is a 10-minute drive. For sandy beaches, Minehead is 15 minutes away.

search_summary.description: Short summary used in search results
search_summary.example: A charming thatched cottage with stunning views across Porlock Vale to the Bristol Channel.

total_guest.description: Maximum number of guests the property sleeps

additional_guest.description: Number of additional guests allowed above the base rate

free_guest.description: Number of guests included in the base price

price_per_night.description: Base price per night in GBP

price_per_week.description: Base price per week in GBP

additional_guest_price.description: Additional guest price per night in GBP

security_deposit_info.example: Returned within 7 days of departure subject to inspection.

indoor_description.example: Open-plan kitchen/living area with wood burner, Smart TV, and board games.

outdoor_description.example: Enclosed garden with patio furniture and BBQ. Stunning views over the vale.

parking.example: Private driveway with space for 2 cars.

ev_charge_note.example: Type 2 charger available in the driveway.

house_rules.description: House rules that guests must follow
house_rules.example: No smoking. Maximum 2 well-behaved dogs by arrangement.

pets_suitable.description: Whether pets are suitable beyond the is_pets flag

cat_note.example: Maximum 2 dogs. Please keep dogs off the furniture.

mobility_suitable.description: Whether restricted mobility access is available

restricted_mobility_note.example: Steps to the front door. Ground-floor bedroom and wet room available.

property_place_slug.description: Slug of the place this property belongs to

airport_distance.description: Distance to nearest airport in miles

trainStation_distance.description: Distance to nearest train station in miles

nearestbeach_distance.description: Distance to nearest beach in miles

nearestshop_distance.description: Distance to nearest shop in miles

tip_get_there.description: How to get there / directions tip
tip_get_there.example: A car is recommended for exploring the area.

live.description: Whether the property is live and bookable

online.description: Whether the property is published online

created.description: When the property listing was created

modified.description: When the property listing was last modified

data.title: PropertyDetail

schema.title: PropertyDetailResponse

403.description: Invalid API key, IP not whitelisted, or origin not allowed

schema.description: Standard error response returned by all endpoints when a request fails (4xx/5xx)

statusCode.description: HTTP status code indicating the type of error

message.description: Human-readable error message, or an array of validation error strings for 422 responses

error.description: Short error label matching the HTTP status text

schema.title: Error

schema.description: Standard error response returned by all endpoints when a request fails (4xx/5xx)

statusCode.description: HTTP status code indicating the type of error

message.description: Human-readable error message, or an array of validation error strings for 422 responses

error.description: Short error label matching the HTTP status text

schema.title: Error

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check Retry-After header

schema.description: Error response returned when a client exceeds their configured rate limit

retryAfter.description: Number of seconds the client should wait before retrying

schema.title: RateLimitError
